question: From 2020-2022 MTA subway ridership, take the peak year and build the school-year window from four years before through that year. Among Texas counties that are top five by average summer meal program sites in that window, what is the highest average site count, rounded to the nearest integer? Return the rounded number in `Number` format. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Summing Subways: Total Estimated Ridership by year (from Date) for 2020-2022, the maximum total is 1012505879 in 2022.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2020-2022 has the highest total subway ridership in MTA? (Use Date to derive year; sum Subways: Total Estimated Ridership by year and select the maximum.)

2.fact: In 2018-2019 (<node_1 answer> - 4 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1052), DALLAS (1014), HIDALGO (494), BEXAR (411), TARRANT (367).
2.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 4 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 4>-<node_1 answer - 3 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

3.fact: In 2019-2020 (<node_1 answer> - 3 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1919), DALLAS (1479), BEXAR (1038), TARRANT (688), HIDALGO (515).
3.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 3 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 3>-<node_1 answer - 2 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

4.fact: In 2020-2021 (<node_1 answer> - 2 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (2674), DALLAS (1504), BEXAR (1168), TARRANT (1033), HIDALGO (700).
4.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 2 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 2>-<node_1 answer - 1 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

5.fact: In 2021-2022 (<node_1 answer> - 1 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1825), DALLAS (1545), BEXAR (814), TARRANT (757), HIDALGO (526).
5.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 1 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 1>-<node_1 answer (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

6.fact: In 2022-2023 (<node_1 answer> school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1016), DALLAS (688), BEXAR (364), HIDALGO (353), TARRANT (303).
6.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer>-<node_1 answer + 1 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Year with highest MTA subway ridership (2020-2022) -> 2022
Derived school year range: 2018-2019 through 2022-2023 (node_1 answer - 4 to node_1 answer school years)
AGGREGATION: Compute average across all 5 years -> Top 5 are {HARRIS: 1697.2, DALLAS: 1246.0, BEXAR: 759.0, TARRANT: 629.6, HIDALGO: 517.6}
Result: Highest average is Harris at 1697.2 -> rounded to 1697
